---
title: "Flavio Matos"
subtitle: "Data Analytics Consultant"
image: images/flavio_headshot_bluebg.jpg
toc: false
body-classes: about-page
about: 
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 15em
  id: hero-heading
  links:
    - icon: github
      href: https://github.com/MatosFlavio
      target: _blank
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/flavio-matos/
      target: _blank
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:flavio.matos@faktaconsulting.com
      target: _blank
format:
    html:
      page-layout: full
comments: false
---

:::::: {#hero-heading}
::: h1
About
:::

Hi, I'm Flavio.
I'm a Data Analytics Consultant with 5+ years of experience helping businesses turn data into better decisions. 

My journey started at Unilever, where I worked on process optimization projects that reduced waste and generated over £600,000 in savings. Since then, I've partnered with established companies and startups across **marketing, finance, and operations** to build dashboards, automate reporting, and create scalable analytics solutions.

I enjoy combining technical expertise with business thinking, helping teams move beyond spreadsheets and reports to uncover insights that drive real impact.

Outside of consulting, I'm an active member of a global data community, having trained over **100 professionals**, spoken at events across **New York, London, Portugal, and Brazil**, and received recognitions from Tableau Community for my work and contributions.

My goal is simple: make data more accessible, actionable, and valuable for the people who use it.

::: h2
Certifications
:::

::: {.certs-container}
::: {layout-ncol="7"}
![](images/about/certifications/tableau.png)

![](images/about/certifications/micro.png)

![](images/about/certifications/Certification_Designer_Core.png)

![](images/about/certifications/Certification_Designer_Advanced.png)

![](images/about/certifications/ML%20alterx.png)

![](images/about/certifications/aws_tech.png)

![](images/about/certifications/aws_pract.png)
:::
:::
::::::
